meta.disclaimer: Always verify requirements at gov.uk/foreign-travel-advice before travel. Visa rules change without notice.

AR.name: Argentina
AR.notes: Passport valid for duration of stay. No prior registration required.

AU.name: Australia
AU.notes: Electronic Travel Authority required before boarding. Apply via the official Australian ETA app — instant approval in most cases.

BR.name: Brazil
BR.notes: Visa-free access restored for UK passport holders in 2023. Passport must be valid for duration of stay.

CA.name: Canada
CA.notes: Electronic Travel Authorization required for air travel. Not needed if arriving by land or sea. Apply before booking flights.

CO.name: Colombia
CO.notes: 90 days visa-free, extendable once for another 90 days at Migración Colombia office. Total max stay 180 days per year.

CU.name: Cuba
CU.applyAt: UK departure airport or online before travel
CU.notes: Tourist card (tarjeta del turista) required. Pink card for UK departures. Many airlines include it in the ticket price — check with your airline. Extendable on arrival for another 30 days.

EG.name: Egypt
EG.applyAt: On arrival at airport, or apply online at visa2egypt.gov.eg
EG.notes: Visa on arrival available at major airports. Pre-applying online avoids queues. Single-entry 30 days.

ID.name: Indonesia
ID.applyAt: On arrival at major airports including Bali (DPS) and Jakarta (CGK)
ID.notes: Visa on arrival at most international airports. Extendable once for 30 more days at immigration office. E-visa also available online for 60 days.

IN.name: India
IN.processingTime: 72 hours (apply at least 4 days before travel)
IN.notes: e-Tourist Visa available for 30 or 90 days (single or double entry). e-Visa for 1 year also available. Apply at least 4 days before travel — do not leave it last minute.

JP.name: Japan
JP.notes: Visa-free for tourism. Passport must be valid for duration of stay. Japan is introducing a Digital Travel Authorization system in 2025 — verify current requirements before travel.

KE.name: Kenya
KE.notes: Electronic Travel Authorization replaced visa on arrival in January 2024. Must apply before departure — you will not be allowed to board without it.

KR.name: South Korea
KR.notes: Visa-free for UK passport holders. K-ETA requirement suspended. Passport valid for 6 months beyond stay recommended.

LK.name: Sri Lanka
LK.notes: ETA currently free online. Apply before travel at the official Sri Lanka ETA website. Extendable to 90 days on arrival.

MA.name: Morocco
MA.notes: Visa-free for UK passport holders. Passport must be valid for at least 6 months beyond travel dates.

MX.name: Mexico
MX.notes: Visa-free. Fill in tourist card (FMM) on arrival or online. Passport valid for 6 months beyond stay recommended.

MY.name: Malaysia
MY.notes: Visa-free for UK passport holders. Passport must be valid for at least 6 months.

NZ.name: New Zealand
NZ.notes: NZeTA (New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority) required. Apply via official NZ government site or app. Also pays an International Visitor Conservation and Tourism Levy (IVL) at same time.

PE.name: Peru
PE.notes: Visa-free for UK passport holders. Passport valid for 6 months beyond stay recommended.

PH.name: Philippines
PH.notes: 30 days visa-free on arrival. Extendable at Bureau of Immigration (BI) to up to 59 days, then in monthly increments up to 3 years.

QA.name: Qatar
QA.notes: Visa-free on arrival for UK passport holders. Extendable for a further 30 days.

SG.name: Singapore
SG.notes: 30 days visa-free. Extendable to 90 days at ICA (Immigration and Checkpoints Authority). Singapore is usually very strict about having proof of onward travel.

TH.name: Thailand
TH.notes: 60-day visa exemption for UK passport holders (extended from 30 days in 2024). Extendable by 30 days at immigration. For longer stays, apply for a tourist visa (TR) at a Thai embassy before travel.

TR.name: Turkey
TR.notes: e-Visa required. Apply online before travel — do not rely on obtaining at the border. Valid for multiple entries within 180 days.

TZ.name: Tanzania
TZ.applyAt: On arrival or apply online at eservices.immigration.go.tz
TZ.notes: Single-entry visa on arrival at major ports. e-Visa recommended to avoid queues. Visa includes Zanzibar.

AE.name: United Arab Emirates
AE.applyAt: Automatic on arrival — no prior application needed
AE.notes: Free 30-day visa on arrival for UK passport holders. Extendable for 30 more days at General Directorate of Residency and Foreigners Affairs (GDRFA).

US.name: United States
US.notes: ESTA (Electronic System for Travel Authorization) is required for all UK visitors flying to the US. Apply at the official CBP site — beware of unofficial sites charging more. ESTA is valid for 2 years or until passport expires.

VN.name: Vietnam
VN.notes: 45-day visa exemption for UK passport holders (extended in 2023). For stays up to 90 days apply for an e-visa ($25) at evisa.xuatnhapcanh.gov.vn. E-visa is single or multiple entry.

ZA.name: South Africa
ZA.notes: Visa-free for UK passport holders. Passport must have at least 2 blank pages for entry stamps. Yellow fever certificate required if arriving from certain countries.
